svg.text: ① Composed + custom — realestate1 deploys finance1 + service1 and builds bespoke transaction / document agents with agent1.
② Human decides transactions — agents draft & assist; people decide & sign every deal, payment & approval.
③ Fair & grounded — no biased screening or steering; listings & terms tie to real records; truthful marketing.
④ Compliant & accurate — RERA alignment; document, title & escrow integrity; idempotent payments.
⑤ Private & assured — buyer / tenant & financial data protected; assure1 certifies fairness & accuracy before go-live.
⑥ Outcome-led — cycle time, conversion, errors & service, measured — delivered via the elan1 method.
